BRANCH.COMMENT: check for JMSMessage exist or not

EXIT.NAME: $default
EXIT.COMMENT: exit the repeat if no JMS message available

Values.value: schedulerToCreateAutoOptin ---No. of messages retrieved from queue --- %size% ---

LOOP.COMMENT: --- Create a list to group JMS messages ---

MAP.COMMENT: --- Find size of the grouped events list ---

BRANCH.COMMENT: --- Check if there is 1 event or multiple in the grouped events ---

Values.value: schedulerToCreateAutoOptin --- 1 single message sent to singleEvent Queue for entity --- %groupedList/documents[0]/entityId%
schedulerToCreateAutoOptin --- %size% grouped messages sent to groupedEvents Queue for entity --- %groupedList/documents[0]/entityId%
